# Oli & Hue

> Oli & Hue is a design and development studio for startups and growing businesses. We combine product design, software development, and marketing under one roof.

## About

- **Website**: https://www.oliandhue.com
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Location**: India (serving clients worldwide)
- **Email**: hello@oliandhue.com
- **Tagline**: Design & Dev Studio

Oli & Hue is a design and development studio built for startups. We handle product design (UI/UX), website design, branding, software development, and AI-powered products. Our sister brand Bumbee.Studio handles marketing (social media, paid ads, funnels, analytics).

We think like founders because we are founders. AI powers our workflow — from research to iteration to deployment — delivering agency-quality work at startup speed.

## Services

### 1. Product Design (UI/UX)
- Mobile and web app design
- User research and interaction design
- Design systems and component libraries
- Prototyping and user testing
- Branding and visual identity

### 2. Software Development
- Full-stack web application development
- AI-powered product development
- Agentic AI integration — custom AI agents that plan, execute, use tools, and complete tasks autonomously
- Custom AI agent development
- SaaS product design and build
- UX design for AI workflows

### 3. Website Design
- Marketing websites and landing pages
- Conversion-focused design
- Responsive and accessible design

### 4. Branding
- Logo design and brand guidelines
- Typography and visual systems
- Brand strategy and positioning

### 5. Bumbee.Studio — Marketing (sister brand)
- Social media management
- Paid advertising (Meta, TikTok, Google)
- Brand strategy and positioning
- Marketing funnels and landing pages
- Analytics and performance reporting
- Content marketing
- Website: https://bumbee.studio

## Pricing

### Design Partner (Monthly Subscription)
Your dedicated design and development team on a monthly subscription.
- **Starter**: From ₹75,000 / $899 per month — 1 dedicated designer, UI/UX, website design, branding basics
- **Professional**: From ₹1,50,000 / $1,799 per month — Senior designer + team, design systems, UX research, strategy calls
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing — Full design team, multi-product support, custom SLA
- Pause or cancel anytime, no lock-in

### Design + Development Track
- **Build**: From ₹2,00,000 / $2,399 per month — 1 designer + 1 developer, MVP builds
- **Growth**: From ₹3,50,000 / $4,199 per month — Full design + dev team, AI integration, SaaS builds
- **Scale**: Custom pricing — Enterprise builds, agentic AI, custom SLA

### Project-Based (One-Time)
One-time design or development projects with clear scope and delivery.
- Fixed-scope for UI/UX, website, branding, or development projects
- Structured deliverables and defined milestones
- Dedicated project manager

## Team
- A strong team of experts with 12+ years combined experience
- 2 Co-Founders
- Dedicated design and development teams
- Team members think like founders, not vendors

## Portfolio
Trusted by startups including:
- Plutohive — Social media platform for students and young founders
- Hatch — "Their design, they think like founders" (Founder & CEO)
- CosmiKit
- Foxpatch
- UnQ SCS
- Trafitizer

## Differentiators
1. **AI-Powered Workflow** — We use AI tools internally for faster turnarounds and smarter insights
2. **Founder Mindset** — Our team operates with founder mentality, not vendor mentality
3. **Full-Stack Capability** — Design, development, and marketing under one roof
4. **Agentic AI Expertise** — We build intelligent software with custom AI agents
5. **Flexibility** — Monthly retainer or project-based, pause or cancel anytime
